name: @printstream/bridge
description: Desktop tray bridge for connecting LAN Bambu printers to PrintStream.

scripts.package:appimage: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs appimage
scripts.package:appimage:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs appimage arm64
scripts.package:appimage:x64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs appimage x64
scripts.package:all-supported: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs all-supported
scripts.package:all-supported:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs all-supported arm64
scripts.package:all-supported:x64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs all-supported x64
scripts.package:desktop:dir: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs dir
scripts.package:host: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs host
scripts.package:host:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs host arm64
scripts.package:host:x64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs host x64
scripts.package:linux:all: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs linux-all
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs linux
scripts.package:linux:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs linux arm64
scripts.package:linux:x64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs linux x64
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs mac
scripts.package:update-bundle:api: npm run build && node scripts/package-update-bundle.mjs --out-dir data/bridge-releases
scripts.package:win:all: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs win-all
scripts.package:win: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs win
scripts.package:win:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs win arm64
scripts.package:win:x64: npm run build && node scripts/package-desktop.mjs win x64
